summary: Autonomous classification only. The original canonical hint #40147 is already closed; the closest live canonical replacement for the root_id/thread_id routing family is #73958. The cluster is over-broad, so P2P thread routing, topic-root resolution, slash-command handling, and typing/ack UX were split into related subfamilies. No close actions are safe in this pass because the useful contributor PRs are either not credited by a landed replacement, still need review/repair, or are waiting on open fix PRs. #74001 is quarantined because a hydrated security-review bot comment raises a DoS/CWE finding.
